prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2.0L TFSI EA888 Gen 3 (CCTA/CBFA) with a custom-built K04-064 turbo upgrade from BorgWarner, paired with a Precision Turbo & Engine 4660T compressor wheel for 350+ HP at 22 PSI on E85 fuel. Supporting mods include a custom 3.5" stainless steel intercooler piping system by Vibrant Performance, a high-flow fuel system with Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors, and a Bosch 044 fuel pump.

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Quaife ATB differential (QDF7Z) for the T34 020 4-speed transaxle, upgraded CV joints from GKN Driveline, and a custom lightweight flywheel by Fidanza (PN: 228031) for the EA888 engine. Clutch system upgraded to a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily with a billet aluminum pressure plate for 450 ft-lbs torque capacity.

Suspension overhaul with custom-fabricated KW Variant 3 coilovers (adapted for T2/T3 chassis) with 400 lbs/in front springs and 350 lbs/in rear springs, paired with polybushings from Energy Suspension (PN: 9.5108G) for the torsion beam front and trailing arms. Rear sway bar upgraded to a 22mm adjustable unit from Suspension Techniques (PN: SB-VW-22).
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using fiberglass fender flares from Airkewld (PN: AK-VW-T2-WB), extending the track width by 4" front and 5" rear. Rear quarter panels reinforced with carbon fiber overlays from Seibon Carbon (PN: VW-T2-QP-CF).

Custom front bumper with integrated tow hooks and a 3D-printed splitter from Maxton Design (PN: MX-VW-T2-SPL), paired with a rear diffuser from Rocket Bunny (PN: RB-VW-T2-DIFF) for aerodynamic balance. Side skirts fabricated from 1.5mm aluminum sheet with integrated LED ground effects by Diode Dynamics.

Interior stripped and reupholstered with Recaro SRD-E seats (PN: 391.20.00) mounted on custom floor-mounted brackets, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (PN: 0111201010) on a NRG Innovations quick-release hub. Full custom roll cage by Custom Cages (PN: CC-VW-T2-8PT) with integrated harness bar for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses (PN: 41400.60).
